title: Ability to Edit Published Automations
excerpt: Simply what the title suggests - the ability to open up an automation that has previously been created and edit any part of it. Custom automations regain the ability to add and subject statements.

posts.author: theunicorn (Devon)
posts.cookedHtml: Simply what the title suggests - the ability to open up an automation that has previously been created and edit any part of it. Custom automations regain the ability to add and subject statements.

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@theunicorn

I agree that this would be nice to have.

Until that happens, I did a quick video on a workaround that will allow you to edit custom automations: Quick Tip - The Trick to Editing Custom Automations - YouTube
